subject: iPhone not receiving text messages (SMS/iMessage)
description: User reports missed texts — some contacts' messages never arrive while iMessages from other iPhone users work fine.

ts_steps.title: Send Receive
ts_steps.action: Correct number and Apple ID checked.

ts_steps.title: Start new conversations from
ts_steps.action: Prefer phone number if SMS mix issues.

ts_steps.title: Blocked list
ts_steps.action: Settings → Messages → Blocked — verify sender absent.

ts_steps.title: Filter unknown senders
ts_steps.action: Disable test — see if messages in unknown tab.

ts_steps.title: eSIM
ts_steps.action: Cellular — line active; carrier refresh if needed.

ts_steps.title: Deregister iMessage
ts_steps.action: If switched from Android — Apple web tool with number.

ts_steps.title: Carrier SMS
ts_steps.action: Carrier resets SMSC or provisioning rarely.

internal_information: Green SMS vs blue iMessage; Android deregister; carrier filter; blocked tab.
